# Platform Notes: TikTok Ads

## Best uses

- Short-form demo
- Workflow drama
- High-velocity hook testing
- Creator-style scripts

## Agent rules

- First two seconds decide survival
- Show pain visually
- Make the transformation obvious

## Required campaign artifact sections

- Objective
- Buyer state
- Tactic
- Offer
- Creative/copy variants
- Landing page
- Metrics
- Launch notes
- Learning update path
